blended.narrative: Rabbit Hill is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing rain, highs of 39°F.
Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 38°F.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
